programme.title: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: After reading a book about dating and changing her personality to find a lover, a woman realizes the man she wants is right in front of her.

programme.title: The Memory Book
programme.desc: A woman (Meghan Ory) embarks on a quest to find a couple that she only knows through photographs from the 1970s.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: When a celebrity marriage counselor (Vanessa Marcil) is left high and dry at the altar, her contractor steps in as the groom to help her save face.

programme.title: Lead With Your Heart
programme.desc: When their parents contemplate splitting up, two teens hatch a scheme to make them realize how much they need each other.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Residents of Hope Valley continue to enjoy the festival, and everyone comes together to help one of their own.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Walden arrives back in town, putting more pressure than ever on Lucas and the residents of Hope Valley; Bill comes up with a plan to stop Walden; new investors arrive from the oil company.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Rosemary don't agree about how best to share unsettling news in the town regarding the coal mines, but that's put behind them when Rosemary hears even more shocking news.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: With the mine reopening imminent, Gowen decides to take drastic measures to make sure it stays closed; Elizabeth and Lucas struggle to communicate with each other; Lucas gets out of town to clear his head.

programme.desc: Matthew meets the father who abandoned him; a famous author stays at the Wilder boarding house.

programme.desc: Walnut Grove citizens vow to destroy their homes after learning that Eastern financiers own their town.

programme.desc: When Ty helps Jack and Tim on a cattle drive, an accident jeopardizes their plans.

programme.desc: Tim asks Amy and Georgie for help to discourage Jade from accepting a suspicious sponsorship deal.

programme.desc: The Ingalls (Michael Landon, Karen Grassle, Melissa Gilbert) of Wisconsin make a new life on the Kansas frontier.

programme.desc: A high-powered executive lies about her career on her online dating profile, while her match also hides his true identity.

programme.title: A Taste of Summer
programme.desc: A woman moves to Bright Shore, where she opens a restaurant and rediscovers her passion. Upon arrival, she encounters a former baseball player who has a competitive streak and owns his own restaurant.

programme.title: Stranded in Paradise
programme.desc: Laid off from her corporate job, a woman (Vanessa Marcil) embarks on a getaway to Puerto Rico and meets a handsome man (James Denton).

programme.title: Wedding March 2: Resorting to Love
programme.desc: Former sweethearts Olivia and Mick are now running a wedding resort after unexpectedly reuniting. As they work together in their new venture, they soon realize that although their business relationship is flawed, there may be romance on the horizon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Wedding March 3: Here Comes the Bride
programme.desc: It's a full Valentine's Day weekend at the inn when Olivia and Mick host their families. Things get chaotic when Mick's sister decides to have her wedding at the inn that weekend and Mick's daughter announces plans to drop out of college.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
